commit.message:
feat(model-3d): add arc face splitting with edge snapping

- Add splitFaceByCurve kernel function that splits a face along a
  multi-segment curve path. First splits with a straight edge between
  boundary endpoints, then iteratively inserts intermediate vertices
  along the arc path via splitEdge + vertex repositioning.
- Add findPointOnBoundary helper to locate which face edge a point
  lies on, with tolerance for floating-point errors.
- Add edge snapping to ArcTool using existing snap infrastructure
  (generateAllSnapCandidates, snapPoint) for both start and end points.
- Replace D-shape ExtrudeGeometry with TubeGeometry for standalone
  arc creation — arcs are open curves, not enclosed shapes.
- Add targetFaceIndex to ArcTool DrawingState for HEMesh face lookup.
- Add 4 tests for splitFaceByCurve covering straight curves, multi-point
  arcs, boundary validation, and coplanarity.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Force Touch detection for 3FC/4FC/5FC click recognizers

Replace time-based holdDuration with pressure-based Force Touch detection
for click recognizers. Click + pressure > basePressure × 1.5 triggers the
force action. 5FC requires Force Touch as safety mechanism (normal click
= no action). Swap LPWH defaults: left=save, right=undo. Async-signal-safe
crash reporter. Various UI improvements (cheat sheet zones, settings,
onboarding, stats).

fix: Corrige injeção de assinatura PDF (ByteRange) para validação ITI VALIDAR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix rollout answer quality and heuristic evaluator

Three issues causing 0 training examples after filtering:

1. Token budget too low (256) for thinking models like Qwen3 — the
   <think> tags consumed all tokens, leaving empty/truncated answers.
   Bumped to 512, with _force_answer using explicit 512 budget.

2. Evidence truncation at 300 chars cut off relevant info from chunks.
   Increased to 1000 chars per passage so the LLM can actually see
   the answer in the retrieved evidence.

3. Heuristic evaluator failed on correct answers because normalize()
   didn't strip punctuation — "rules," != "rules", "dna." != "dna".
   Now strips punctuation and citation markers before token comparison.

Also: when JSON parsing fails in _reason_with_llm, call _force_answer
for a clean natural-language answer instead of leaking raw LLM content.

Tested locally: 2/5 examples survive filtering (pass rates 0.75, 0.88).

commit.message:
Feature/security improvements (#3)

* feat(security): comprehensive security hardening (Phases 1-2)

Multi-agent security audit identified 25 findings across auth, API,
and infrastructure layers. This commit addresses all CRITICAL (3/4),
HIGH (6/7), and key MEDIUM (7/10) issues:

CRITICAL:
- Fail-fast startup if JWT_SECRET missing or insecure default (C2)
- Add requireRole('admin') to 3 unprotected admin endpoints (C3)
- Bind sqlite-web viewer to localhost only (C4)

HIGH:
- Add IDOR ownership checks on wordlist GET endpoints (H1)
- Require CORS_ORIGIN in production (H2)
- Add HSTS, CSP, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy headers (H4)
- Replace spoofable header bypass with MOBILE_APP_SECRET (H5)
- Fix parent_id null check in parent authorization (H7)

MEDIUM:
- Increase password minimum to 8 characters (M1)
- Fix email enumeration timing with consistent 250ms floor (M2)
- Add rate limit on validate-reset-token endpoint (M7)
- Add Zod validation to quiz results endpoint (M8)
- Add file type validation to wordlist import (M9)

Also: updated .gitignore, removed tracked DB file, added security
audit doc, updated README security section and env var table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(security): Phase 3 — token hardening, httpOnly cookies, Google linking consent

M3: Hash refresh tokens with SHA-256 before storing in DB. Raw tokens
are returned to clients but only hashes are persisted, so a DB leak
no longer exposes active sessions.

H6: Move refresh token from localStorage to httpOnly secure cookie
(sameSite=strict, scoped to /api/auth). Access token stays in memory.
Frontend sends credentials:'include' on all auth requests. Mobile
clients can still pass refresh token in request body as fallback.

M4: Google OAuth no longer auto-links to existing email accounts.
Returns { linkPending: true } requiring the client to re-send with
confirmLink: true for explicit user consent.

Also: Updated all Zod password schemas from min(6) to min(8) to match
the authService enforcement. Added confirmLink field to googleAuthSchema.
Added cookie-parser dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(security): Phase 4 — audit logging, structured logger, backup script

- Add audit_log table (migration 013) with indexed action/actor/timestamp
- Add auditService for DB + JSON audit trail on all admin operations
  (role changes, user CRUD, password resets, parent linking, email changes)
- Add structured JSON logger replacing all console.log/error/warn in
  runtime code (routes, services, repositories, config)
- Add database backup script (scripts/backup.sh) with configurable
  retention, SQLite online backup API, and validation
- Add security deployment checklist to docs/security-hardening.md
- Update README with audit logging, structured logging, and backup info

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add missing Phase 3 security features to README

Token hashing, httpOnly cookies, password policy, IDOR protection,
and Google linking consent were implemented but not documented in README.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update inverted-U plot to dense-only with asymmetric fit

Dense models only (16 models, 7 families). Asymmetric fit R²=0.64,
peak at q=0.41. Three curves: symmetric (β=0.42), theoretical from
Zipf (β=0.47), and asymmetric (q^1.33 × (1-q)^1.90).

Replace twilio-go SDK with direct Twilio REST API calls

The twilio-go package is not indexed on proxy.golang.org, causing Docker
builds to fail with git VCS errors. Replace with stdlib net/http calls to
the Twilio Messages API directly — no new dependencies, same functionality.

Also simplify Dockerfile.api: use go mod download (not tidy) since go.sum
is now complete and git is no longer required.

commit.message:
fix: fallback to full avg cost for historical data with moved_at > sold_at

When supplier orders are entered retroactively (moved_at = today but
sold_at = last month), calculateAvgCostAtDate finds no movements before
the sale date and returns 0. Add fallback: if no movements exist before
the sale date but movements exist in total, use current weighted avg.

This handles historical data migration correctly without breaking
point-in-time accuracy for real-time data entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: address all v2.0.0 code review findings (BUG-1 through DESIGN-4)

BUG-1 (critical): Only clear needs_vector_cleanup after confirmed Qdrant
delete success; previously the flag was cleared even when delete_by_doc_id
threw, leaving stale vectors permanently.

BUG-2 (medium): Move retry backoff sleep to after the semaphore context in
_run_pipeline_wrapper so the slot is freed during the wait; previously a
5-second sleep held the semaphore, blocking all other pipeline tasks.

BUG-3 (medium): Add defensive key-existence checks in
SparseEmbeddingService._parse_sparse_results to raise EmbeddingError
(retryable) instead of a bare KeyError (not retried) on malformed API
responses.

BUG-4 (medium): Offload FastEmbed local inference in embed_texts_async to a
thread via run_in_executor so the event loop is not blocked during CPU-bound
ML inference.

BUG-5 (low): Offload chunking and BM25 vectorisation in PipelineService to
threads via run_in_executor.

DESIGN-1: Add status_callback parameter to RetrievalService.retrieve() and
propagate it through _collect_candidates and _search_single_query; replace
the fake pre-retrieval SSE status events in _stream_retrieval with a
queue-based mechanism so events fire as each step actually executes.

DESIGN-2: Add logger.warning with exc_info=True in context_synthesis_service
instead of silently swallowing exceptions.

DESIGN-3: Wrap JSON.parse in try/catch inside the SSE processLine handler in
frontend api.ts to prevent stream crashes on malformed data.

DESIGN-4: Read BACKEND_URL env var in next.config.ts rewrites so the backend
address is configurable without modifying source code.

1016X Höflichkeit: Komplette Reparatur aller kritischen Bugs

Folgende Fehler wurden behoben:
- sec-1, sec-2, sec-3 fehlte das öffnende <div class="sec" id="..."> Tag
  (nur id="sec-N"> ohne öffnendes div — alle Inhalte wurden in sec-0 gerendert)
- initQa() suchte nach #qaContainer (existiert nicht) und las q.antwort
  (Feld existiert nicht in QA_DATA — nur text und cat)
- allowDrop(), dropZuo(), zeigeLoesung1(), resetZuordnung() fehlten komplett im JS
- WORTSCHATZ-Einträge hatten keine foto/art/wort/plural-Felder →
  baueWortschatz() gab überall undefined aus

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: CronScheduler stale heap bug, add 37 test suites, bump to v2.6.7

Fix CronScheduler scheduleNext() returning early on stale heap entries
after cron removal, blocking all subsequent crons from firing (#33).
Fix graceful shutdown burst load causing AckBatcher errors.
Add comprehensive test coverage: 19 embedded + 18 TCP test suites
covering stress, ETL, retry, cron, queue-group, shutdown, backpressure,
priority, lifecycle, data-integrity, idempotency, timeout, flows,
removal, pause-resume, worker-scaling, cancellation, DLQ, and bulk ops.
